explanation: The property states that globally (G), if the system is in 'SelfTestMode', then the 'testFl2Pass' condition must always be true. This captures that the self-test procedure, when active, shall confirm the FI2 flow meter's correct connection and calibration by indicating a successful test.

The LTL property (G (SelfTestMode -> testFl2Pass)) expresses that at all times, if the system is in SelfTest Mode, then the FI2 flow meter test must pass. This directly translates 'The self-test procedure shall confirm the FI2 flow meter in the patient breathing circuit is connected in the right direction and is calibrated' by ensuring that the successful confirmation of the flow meter (testFl2Pass) is true whenever the system is actively undergoing the self-test procedure (SelfTestMode).

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'SelfTest Mode', it must be the case that the 'Fl2 flow meter test passes'. This directly translates the requirement that the self-test procedure confirms the FI2 flow meter is connected correctly and calibrated, as 'testFl2Pass' indicates the success of this check.

The property states that globally, it must always be the case that if the system is in 'SelfTest Mode' (bool_exp2), then the 'Fl2 flow meter test pass' (bool_exp3) condition must also be true. This captures the requirement that during the self-test procedure, the FI2 flow meter is confirmed to be connected correctly and calibrated, which is indicated by the test passing successfully.

The LTL property states that globally, it must always be the case that if the self-test procedure passes successfully, then the FI2 flow meter test also passes successfully. This directly captures the requirement that the self-test 'shall confirm' the flow meter's correct connection and calibration, indicating a direct logical implication that must always hold.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in SelfTestMode (bool_exp2), then eventually (F) the FI2 flow meter test must pass (bool_exp3). This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure shall confirm the correct connection and calibration of the FI2 flow meter. The 'shall confirm' implies that the success is an eventual outcome of the procedure.

The property states that whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', it must eventually lead to the successful passing of the FI2 flow meter test (indicated by 'testFl2Pass'). This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure 'shall confirm' the flow meter's status, implying an eventual successful outcome.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in Self-Test Mode (bool_exp1), then the FI2 flow meter test must pass (bool_exp3). This directly captures the requirement that the self-test procedure shall confirm the FI2 flow meter is connected and calibrated correctly.

The property states that whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', it is eventually confirmed within 1 time unit that the 'Fl2 flow meter test pass' occurs. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure must successfully confirm the FI2 flow meter's correct connection and calibration.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', the 'testFl2Pass' condition must hold. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure ensures and confirms the proper connection and calibration of the FI2 flow meter by making sure this state is true while the procedure is active. This is an invariant property during the self-test mode.
